goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'cambridge lodge restaurant'.
Make sure you get 'area', 'food type', and 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
The hotel should be in the 'north' and should have 'a star of 3'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called cambridge lodge restaurant
Make sure you get area, food type, and postcode
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the type of guesthouse
The hotel should be in the north and should have a star of 3
Make sure you get address and postcode
